channel.title: Just Another Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Just Another Blog

item.title: d-way Heap
item.description: Introduction Implementation Running time Benchmark Introduction First some basics. A heap is a complete binary tree, where each node satisfies the heap property: In a max-heap, heap property says that \( parent ≥ child \) . In a min-heap, heap property says that \( parent ≤ child \) . A complete tree is a binary tree where all levels, except possibly the last, are completely filled.
